title: Darkmode, check! x16
body:
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/560544?logo=curseforge&color=orange)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/darkmode-check/files) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/UQpQGbkD)



# Darkmode, check!
This x16 resource-pack slightly redesigns the graphical user interface (GUI / JEE-yoo-EYE) of Minecraft to be a darkmode with neatly rounded corners. In addition, it supports the GUI of various mods.

Also available on [CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/darkmode-check).


## Compatibility
Minecraft: Java Edition, version 1.6 through 1.20 is supported.


## Mod Support
If you have any suggestions for mods that you'd like to see added, or have any issues with the resource-pack, feel free to contact me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/rZxbrktwjm).

| | Mod |
| :- | :- |
| ✔ | [**Crafting Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks) |
| ✔ | [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) |
| ✔ | [**Easy Anvils**](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) |
| ✔ | [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) |
| ✔ | [**Plasmo Voice**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) |
| ✔ | [**Replay Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) |
| ✔ | [**Roughly Enough Items**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) |
| ✔ | [**Simple Voice Chat**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) |
| ✔ | [**Traveler's Backpack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) |
| ✔ | [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) |
